title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Gate Lens: Generated Vendor
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates generated vendor increment in a zero-diff formatting gate. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Exclude generated, vendored, fixture, and snapshot files intentionally.
Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
